title: Cloud MC
description: Go beyond the skies go beyond the stars and go beyond the worlds
body:
A modpack were you can make a secured and furnished, go to space, explore world, and have fun with friends. There are a total of 13 mods, you can go to space thanks to galacticraft and you can know your location trhough Xaero's Minimap mod.

Mods Included: 
Biomes O' Plenty (by Forstride)
Just Enough Items (JEI) (by mezz)
MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod (by MrCrayfish)
Waystones2Waypoints (by Noobanidus)
The Twilight Forest (by Benimatic)
Patchouli (by Vazkii)
Backpacked (by MrCrayfish)
Xaero's Minimap (by xaero96)
Baubles (by Azanor13)
Obfuscate (by MrCrayfish)
ConnectedTexturesMod (by tterrag1098)
Botania (by Vazkii)
101 Dimensions (by supermj767)
The Aether (by TheAetherTeam)
MixinBooter (by CleanroomMC)
Spartan Shields (by ObliviousSpartan)
Skin Layers 3D (Fabric/Forge) (by tr7zw)
MrCrayfish's Gun Mod (by MrCrayfish)
Waystones (by BlayTheNinth)
SteveKunG's Lib (by SteveKunG)
Galacticraft Legacy (by TeamGalacticraft)
More Planets - Galacticraft Add-on (by SteveKunG)
Security Craft (by Geforce132)
MrCrayfish's Vehicle Mod (by MrCrayfish)
Ender Mail (by Chaosyr)
Iron Chests (by ProgWML6)
Epic Knights: Shields, Armor and Weapons [Fabric & Forge] (by magistu_)
